calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff John Moore's motion for approval of the settlement in this action as to Defendants LB Marketing, Inc. and Best Buy Co. and for entry of the [Proposed] Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement meets the requirements of Proposition 65. (Health & Safety Code 25249.7(f)(4).)

Order and judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Continued To Apr-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
